scope_caveats: (s1) Linear magnetostatic — HTS critical-state / quench / E-J power law not modelled.
(s2) 2-D axisymmetric — leads, support, 3-D return paths absent.
(s3) μ_r=1 assumed — HTS magnetization (M ≠ 0), persistent current, shielding currents not captured.
(s4) Procedural geometry — `htsSolenoidProxy` from RtscGeometry.swift, not a sourced/measured coil. absorbed=false, GATE_OPEN.
citations: Lorenz 1879 — finite solenoid on-axis B closed form.
Wheeler 1928 — single-layer air-core solenoid inductance formula.
arxiv:0811.2883 — Pecher/Sirois 3-D FEM HTS magnetization (HTS-grade reference).
GetDP — get-dp.org (Geuzaine, U. Liège, Gmsh pair).
